default.reply: Sankalp AI is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly, or select below to connect with a human relationship manager.

idle_balance.headline: Your savings could work harder
idle_balance.body: You have funds sitting idle. Consider a liquid fund or FD for better returns.
idle_balance.compliance_note: Mutual fund investments are subject to market risks.

missed_sip.headline: Your SIP was missed this month
missed_sip.body: Don't worry — you can restart or adjust your SIP amount to stay on track.

goal_milestone.headline: Great progress on your goal! 🎉
goal_milestone.body: You've crossed the halfway mark. Keep the momentum going!

goal_offtrack.headline: Your goal needs a boost
goal_offtrack.body: A small increase in monthly savings can help you stay on track.

spending_spike.headline: Spending alert this month
spending_spike.body: One of your spending categories is higher than usual. Worth a quick look.

cross_sell.headline: Protect your financial future
cross_sell.body: Consider term or health insurance to secure your family's wellbeing.
cross_sell.compliance_note: Insurance is a subject matter of solicitation. IRDAI Registration details available on request.

default.headline: Quick financial tip
default.body: Stay consistent with your investments for long-term wealth building.
